scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @fashion-design-ai/domain && npm run build --workspace @fashion-design-ai/ai
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace @fashion-design-ai/domain && npm run test --workspace @fashion-design-ai/ai
scripts.typecheck: npm run build --workspace @fashion-design-ai/domain && npm run typecheck --workspace @fashion-design-ai/domain && npm run typecheck --workspace @fashion-design-ai/ai
